title: Puppy Luppy Gus
description: An adorable puppy dreams of crazy ways to repair the world around his family to which 7 year old kids take a more realistic approach in fixing. Targeting 4-7 year olds, Puppy Luppy Gus is a humorous animation that focuses on social and communal responsibility.

title: Somnolent Tater
description: A day on the couch turned into everyday on the couch. Here lies the somnolent tater, an inactive genius.

title: SeaSci Squad
description: From the inspired minds of a developmental psychologist, a former wildlife biologist and a serial entrepreneur, SeaSci Squad follows Carina, Dina and Tina as they apply their intellect, humor & individual spirited personalities to understand and work with their sea friends to confront the consequences of a changing climate on the oceans' ecosystems.
